=== empty
# Empty TextView вЂ” renders as blank interior.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 5
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘                  в•‘
в•‘                  в•‘
в•‘                  в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

=== short_lines
# A few short lines, no scroll needed.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 6
lines: Hello world
lines: Second line
lines: Third line
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘Hello world       в•‘
в•‘Second line       в•‘
в•‘Third line        в•‘
в•‘                  в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

=== long_line_wraps
# A line longer than the interior width (18) must wrap, not overflow.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 8
lines: This line is definitely too long to fit in eighteen chars
lines: Short
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘This line is definв•‘
в•‘itely too long to в•‘
в•‘fit in eighteen chв•‘
в•‘ars               в•‘
в•‘Short             в•‘
в•‘                  в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

=== overflow_vertical_scrollbar
# More lines than visible height в†’ scrollbar appears on the right.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 7
scrollable: true
lines: Line 1
lines: Line 2
lines: Line 3
lines: Line 4
lines: Line 5
lines: Line 6
lines: Line 7
lines: Line 8
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘Line 4           в–‘в•‘
в•‘Line 5           в–‘в•‘
в•‘Line 6           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 7           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 8           в–€в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

=== scroll_offset_mid
# Scrollable with scroll_offset in the middle вЂ” thumb should be lower.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 7
scrollable: true
scroll_offset: 3
lines: Line 1
lines: Line 2
lines: Line 3
lines: Line 4
lines: Line 5
lines: Line 6
lines: Line 7
lines: Line 8
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘Line 1           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 2           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 3           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 4           в–‘в•‘
в•‘Line 5           в–‘в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

=== scroll_offset_top
# scroll_offset at max scrolls to top of content.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 7
scrollable: true
scroll_offset: 4
lines: Line 1
lines: Line 2
lines: Line 3
lines: Line 4
lines: Line 5
lines: Line 6
lines: Line 7
lines: Line 8
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘Line 1           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 2           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 3           в–€в•‘
в•‘Line 4           в–‘в•‘
в•‘Line 5           в–‘в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ

=== bottom_align
# BottomAlign: content anchors to the bottom of the viewport.
widget: textview
title: TextView
width: 20
height: 7
bottom_align: true
lines: First
lines: Second
lines: Third
===
в•”в•ђ TextView в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—
в•‘                  в•‘
в•‘                  в•‘
в•‘First             в•‘
в•‘Second            в•‘
в•‘Third             в•‘
в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ
